response.overview: A disciplined theater actor arrives in Amityville to rehearse a stage production — but the quiet home he rents between performances soon becomes haunted by a mysterious ghostly presence.  Calvin lives by strict rehearsal rules, precision, and routine. Proud of being “letter perfect,” he never deviates from the script — on stage or in life. But when he encounters Crystal, a beautiful and enigmatic spirit haunting the house, his carefully controlled world begins to unravel. As their strange connection deepens, Calvin must confront love, fear, obsession, and the possibility of risking everything for someone who may not even belong to the living world.  Blending supernatural mystery, romance, melancholy, and theatrical drama, AMITYVILLE LOVE STREAMS is an emotional ghost story about loneliness, art, and the courage to step outside the script.  Starring Evan Jacobs, Angelique Flores, Mike Hartsfield, Ben Van Der Meer, and Lucas Nyhus.
response.title: Amityville Love Streams
